B 81

MR. & MRS. CRAB JUICY SEAFOOD & BAR

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: February 24, 2026

B · 81/100 · safer than 21% of Orange County restaurants we grade

Does MR. & MRS. CRAB JUICY SEAFOOD & BAR keep a clean kitchen? Mostly — a B (81/100) at its latest inspection, February 24, 2026. That visit logged 1 high-priority, 2 intermediate, and 5 basic violations.

Inspectors cited 1 high-priority, 2 intermediate, and 5 basic violations. That puts it safer than 21% of Orange County restaurants we grade. Diner rating: 4.6 from 1,574 reviews. Menus here flag gluten-free, dairy-free, keto, paleo, and other dietary options.

Get directions Call (407) 233-4945

Inspection history

The following records are from Florida DBPR public inspection records, most recent first.

  1. February 24, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    1 high-priority · 2 intermediate · 5 basic

    • 01 — Food from approved source; safe, unadulterated, sound condition
    • 08 — Cross-contamination: raw foods separated; food protected during prep/storage (×2)
    • 10 — In-use food dispensing utensils properly stored
    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained
    • 21 — Wiping cloths; clean & soiled linens; laundry
    • 41 — Chemicals / toxic substances properly stored & used (×2)

  2. September 19, 2025 · Routine - Food

    Call Back - Complied

    0 high-priority · 1 intermediate · 0 basic

    • 01 — Food from approved source; safe, unadulterated, sound condition

  3. September 18, 2025 · Routine - Food

    Warning Issued

    3 high-priority · 3 intermediate · 1 basic

    • 01 — Food from approved source; safe, unadulterated, sound condition
    • 02 — Consumer advisory, date-marking & labeling of ready-to-eat foods
    • 03 — Temperature control of foods (cold/hot holding, cooking, cooling, reheating)
    • 08 — Cross-contamination: raw foods separated; food protected during prep/storage
    • 10 — In-use food dispensing utensils properly stored
    • 16 — Dishwashing facilities; sanitizer test kits; gauges
    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized
